mentions.note: Infrastructure play serving power industry; fairly new IPO (caller Ron, CA). Revenue +66% YoY, gross profit doubled, backlog $88M up 2x. Cramer: 'Great niche company, I salute you.' Buy.
Blasted by failed metastatic melanoma cancer trial. Can't buy drug stock that drops hard on day 1 of decline. Stock damaged; downgrades likely coming.
Natural gas supply tight; caller (Carter, TN) asks. Cramer: 'Buy, plain and simple. It's exactly what you should be buying right here.' Strong buy.
HVAC with data center exposure at $1,854, nearly double YTD. Cramer: 'Not messing with that one'—too extended.
Charitable Trust holding with parabolic move; down 7% today insufficient to entice fresh buy or add to position. Hold existing.

Stock up from $20→$108 over 12 months (400%+ return, one of greatest turnarounds ever). CEO Lip Bu Tan transformed culture (12→5 management layers), secured federal + Nvidia ($5B) + SoftBank ($2B) capital. CPU-constrained on agentic AI demand; foundry 14A matching TSMC 2029 timeline.

Clear buy at 12x earnings, down 6% on rotation. Cramer waiting for this pullback. Start gingerly, add on 2-3% further declines. Hardware bet vs. expensive Western Digital (46x). CPU shortage tailwind.
Up 3,000% over 12 months at 20x earnings; likely too expensive vs. Micron (12x). Wait for further pullback.

IPO June 11-12 at ~$2T valuation will likely join Nasdaq 100 on day 7 under fast-track rules. $1.4T Nasdaq 100 ETF exposure guarantees forced buying and early enthusiasm. Risk: insider lockup expiration could crush stock after pop; early retail buyers may overpay and get burned.
Caller (Greg, MD) asks. Cramer: 'We are late, late, late. 51x earnings does not make it for me, even if it's a good company.' Valuation too rich despite quality. Avoid.
Commodity company pricing at ~50x next year's earnings. Multiple too rich; pass.

FCC approved $23B EchoStar spectrum purchase for 5G rural coverage. Cramer: 'I don't want to be in AT&T.' Starlink and Amazon Leo satellite competition will overshadow AT&T's rural broadband advantage.

Cramer: 'I think the world of it, I think it's going to go higher' but 'may not necessarily skyrocket.' Indispensable choke point in advanced manufacturing; underperformed Micron/Nvidia/AMD parabolic moves but room to run.
Material company used by chip makers, down 5%; owned by Charitable Trust. Parabolic move even after pullback makes entry too expensive for now.
Natural gas royalty/energy play; caller (William, TX) positive. Hit 52-week high; good yield provides downside protection vs. peers. Cramer affirms thesis.
Amazing quarter with best backlog of any data center stock, but at 53x earnings Cramer says 'no thanks'—valuation prohibitive.
Memory stock down nearly 5%, trades at 46x earnings vs. Micron at 12x. Valuation seems too rich; Micron more compelling.
